title: Fix: Cars not showing in listings

requirements.text: Diagnose and fix the issue causing car listings not to appear on the Home page (featured listings grid) and the Listings browse page. Investigate the backend `getAllListings` query to ensure it correctly returns all stored car listings, verify the frontend `useQueries.ts` hooks are fetching and passing data correctly, and confirm the CarCard and listings grid components are rendering when data is returned. Ensure the pre-populated sample listings are present and visible after the fix.
acceptanceCriteria: The Listings page (/listings) displays all available car listings as CarCard components without a blank or empty state when listings exist in the backend.
The Home page featured listings grid shows at least the most recent/available car listings.
The backend getAllListings function returns a non-empty array of CarListing records when queried.
No console errors or React Query errors appear related to fetching or rendering listings.
Individual listing cards show the car image, make, model, year, mileage, fuel type, and asking price correctly.

constraints: Do not remove or alter existing car listing sample data in the backend.
Do not change the CarListing data model schema.
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts.
nonGoals: Adding new car listings or sample data.
Changing the visual design or layout of listing cards.
Modifying the booking, EMI calculator, or admin dashboard features.
